headline: Morgan Stanley Boosts American Electric Power (AEP) Price Target in Utilities Update
summary: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) is included among the 10 Reliable Dividend Stocks to Buy for Long-Term Investors.
